case_title: AUKEMI HARE VS. OMAKASE RESTAURANT GROUP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY HARE, AUKEMI AS TO DEFENDANT OMAKASE RESTAURANT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARE, AUKEMI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HARE, AUKEMI OMAKASE RESTAURANT GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AUKEMI HARE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OMAKASE RESTAURANT GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA RIVAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARE, AUKEMI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OMAKASE RESTAURANT GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
